zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugues II d'Oisy於大約1075年出生在比利時納姆爾納姆爾時，他的父親Hugues Ier d'Oisy de Cambrai40歲，母親Ada de Rumigny31歲。他於1105年之前與Hildiarde Mons在艾歐洛結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1141年在法國豪-德-福朗斯艾斯隆朋特享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugues II d'Oisy于大约1075年出生在比利时納姆爾納姆爾时，他的父亲Hugues Ier d'Oisy de Cambrai40岁，母亲Ada de Rumigny31岁。他于1105年之前与Hildiarde Mons在艾歐洛结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1141年在法国豪-德-福朗斯艾斯隆朋特享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: d'Oisy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Emile, Aime, Alphonse, Aurore, Fernand, Florent, Gilles, Manon, Michel.
French: from Old French foisil ‘gunflint’, used as a nickname for a maker or seller.
History: Martin Foisy from Bossus-lès-Rumigny in Ardennes married Marie-Madeleine Beaudoin in QC in 1679.

nameMeanings.name: Hugues
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Hugues Capet ( ?938–96 ) was ruler of France ( 987–96 ) and founder of the Capetian dynasty. See Hugh .

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugues II d'Oisy was born about 1075, in Namur, Namur, Belgium, his father, Hugues Ier d'Oisy de Cambrai, was 40 and his mother, Ada de Rumigny, was 31. He married Hildiarde Mons before 1105, in Europe. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 5 daughters. He died in 1141, in Longpont, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, France, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugues II d'Oisy est né environ 1075, à Namur, Namur, Belgique, son père, Hugues Ier d'Oisy de Cambrai, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Ada de Rumigny, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Hildiarde Mons avant 1105, à Europe. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé en 1141, à Longpont, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, France, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugues II d'Oisy um 1075 in Namur, Namen, Belgien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugues Ier d'Oisy de Cambrai 40 und seine Mutter Ada de Rumigny 31. Er hat vor 1105 in Europa Hildiarde Mons geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 5 Töchter. Er starb 1141 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Longpont, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugues II d'Oisy è nato il circa 1075 nel Namur, Namur, Belgio, il suo padre, Hugues Ier d'Oisy de Cambrai, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Ada de Rumigny, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Hildiarde Mons prima del 1105, nel Europa. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1141, nel Longpont, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, Francia, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugues II d'Oisyが約1075年にベルギーナムルナムルで生まれた時，父Hugues Ier d'Oisy de Cambraiは40歳，母Ada de Rumignyは31歳であった。1105年以前にヨーロッパでHildiarde Monsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1141年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスエイスンロングプオントで67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugues II d'Oisy(이)가 대략 1075년 벨기에 남어 남어에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugues Ier d'Oisy de Cambrai(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Ada de Rumigny(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1105년 이전 우럽에서 Hildiarde Mons(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1141년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 아이스니 론그폰트에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugues II d'Oisy nasceu aproximadamente 1075, em Namur, Namur, Bélgica, seu pai, Hugues Ier d'Oisy de Cambrai, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Ada de Rumigny, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Hildiarde Mons antes 1105, em Europa. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1141, em Longpont, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, França, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugues II d'Oisy родился около 1075 г. в местности намур, намур, Бельгия, его отцу по имени Hugues Ier d'Oisy de Cambrai было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Ada de Rumigny, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Hildiarde Mons перед 1105 г. в местности Европа. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей. Он умер в 1141 г. в местности лонгпонт, эисн, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugues II d'Oisy nació aproximadamente 1075, en Namur, Namur, Bélgica, su papá, Hugues Ier d'Oisy de Cambrai, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Ada de Rumigny, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Hildiarde Mons antes de 1105, en Europa. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 5 hijas. Murió en 1141, en Longpont, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 67 años.
